@graph.name: Quartermaster
@graph.description: A fluent, args-first query builder for WP_Query and WP_Term_Query. Quartermaster turns sprawling meta_query, tax_query and date_query arrays into readable, composable PHP while staying 100% WordPress-native under the hood.

mainEntity.name: Is Quartermaster an ORM for WordPress?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Quartermaster is not an ORM, ActiveRecord layer, or SQL query builder. Every fluent method maps to real WP_Query or WP_Term_Query arguments, and the output is a plain WordPress args array.

mainEntity.name: Does Quartermaster require the PressGang theme framework?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Quartermaster is a standalone Composer package for any WordPress project. It is part of the PressGang ecosystem but does not depend on the PressGang framework.

mainEntity.name: How is Quartermaster different from raw WP_Query arrays?

acceptedAnswer.text: Raw arrays are fine for short static queries. Quartermaster helps when queries evolve, branch, or need to be composed without rewriting large nested arrays.
